hero.typewriter: The voice that will change how you read thrillers
hero.manifesto: «There are truths that only emerge in darkness. Characters whose inner logic you find disturbingly understandable.»

stats.l: Novels in the Moya Solà universe

books.label: The Work
books.title: The {em}Moya Solà{/em} universe
books.subtitle: Three novels. Two connected worlds. A psychological territory that doesn't let the reader go.

extracto.label: 004 — Chapter 1
extracto.title: Seven hundred {em}nights{/em}
extracto.hook: Three pages left. The hardest ones.
extracto.sub: The full chapter is free. All you need is an email.

manifesto.label: On Psychological Thriller
manifesto.quote: «Darkness is not the absence of light. It is the space where people discover who they really are when no one is watching. That is what I write.»
manifesto.attr: — Jordi Moya Solà · L'Ametlla del Vallès, Barcelona

circle.label: Private Community
circle.title: The Inner {em}Circle{/em}
circle.body: Not a newsletter. It is the dark room where I work: what never makes it into the published book, the real process, the characters that didn't survive the editorial cut.

about.label: About the author
about.title: Jordi Moya {em}Solà{/em}
about.quote: «I have spent thirteen years building characters who do things no one should fully understand — yet everyone does.»
about.bio1: Born in Granollers (Barcelona). Lives in L'Ametlla del Vallès, where he writes about what people do when no one is watching.
about.bio2: Specializing in high-intensity psychological thriller, his stories explore the space between who we are and who we choose to be under pressure.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk without {em}noise{/em}
contact.body: I read every message. I respond to the ones that require a response.

modal.title: Full Chapter 1
modal.subtitle: Download the complete first chapter of Swingers: Magicfinger as a PDF. Free.
modal.gdpr: I agree to receive the chapter and communications from the author. (GDPR)
modal.success: ✓ Download started. Welcome to the Inner Circle.
modal.error: Processing error. Write to us at hola@jordimoyasola.com

footer.tagline: Psychological thriller. Characters who lie. Endings that don't forgive.
footer.copy: © {year} Jordi Moya Solà. All rights reserved.

cookie.text: We use cookies for analytics and site functionality.
